creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 219986
v1

Builds fine on 11.4 i386 and 13.0 amd64. See URL for verbose changelog.

https://download.gnome.org/sources/librsvg/2.50/librsvg-2.50.1.news
https://download.gnome.org/sources/librsvg/2.50/librsvg-2.50.2.news

Looking at https://portscout.freebsd.org/desktop@freebsd.org.html it's not clear why there was no notification on desktop@ list. Maybe subscribe to GitLab notifications:

1. Open https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/librsvg
2. Click on "Notification settings" (bell icon)
3. Click on "Custom"
4. Mark "New release" (checkbox)

Alternatively, see https://repology.org/maintainer/desktop%40freebsd.org/feed-for-repo/freebsd
